titleStmt.title: SII 27.397: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 397. (A.R. No. 289 of 1931-32.) HĒRĀḌI, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 2) set up in the temple of Janārdanadēva.

This record is engraved on both sides of the slab the first side of which is badly damaged. The name of the king and of his subordinates are therefore lost. The extant portion refers to the year 75 the first two digits of which are lost. It registers gifts of land and money for offerings etc, in a temple and for feeding brāhmaṇas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śirastuṁbi caṁdracā
yilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁ
75 neya varttamāna
śrīmaṁnmahārā
dakṣiṇa paścima Uttara samudrā
rāyaragaṁḍa
Avara nirūpadiṁ
damaged
bāḷinamēle teṟuva bhakta
ḍi ya mūlada bāḷina mīliteṟu bhatta
damaged
bhatta kaṁ mu 3 viṣṇu pāḍiya mūlada bāḷina mēli te
ṟu dra seṭṭiya mūlada bāḷina mēle
teṟuva bhatte hā 50 mū
mēleteṟuva bhattahā hā 20 Āgrake hā 40 mū .
viṣṇu jiṁya mūlada bāḷina mēle teṟuva bhatta hā 40 mu 2 ha
ṟa bāḷa mēle teṟa ga 1 Agrakenaḍava mu 3 hā 30 kaṁ ṇa
bāsuva mūlada bāḷinamēle teṟuva bhatta hā 40 mū 2 hā 20 nā
raṇakalaṁbiya mūlada bāḷina mēle Āgrake naḍava teṟuva bhattahā 10
mū 3 hā 30 dēvālyada teṁkaṇamakiya mēle teṟuva bhatta hā 50
dēvaḷigeya lekhkhakke A vaḻa hā 20 Adake
pūjāriya mēlada A diya gaddeyamēle Āgri de
ginade bhatahāne 40 mu 3 hā 30 rāma taṁṇiru dana mūlada
kiṟiya bāgila koṟavi teṟuva bhatta hā 40 mū 1 hā 20
dēvara mūlada bāḷu bittuva mu hā 40 ṟa mu 16 yi
40 da baro gēṇi bhatta hā 40 ṟa 120
ya Ūṭakeṁdu mejjigege Uravarakayiyali
hoṁnige mariyādayali
yini baharu di ha dēva rudrapūjeya
braṁhmara Uṁ du tuppake Uravaru yi

kalu keṁciya bārana bāhiriya bageya bhatta hā 2
ya mu 337 hā 34 bi ya ḍala dēvarige
muṟuhottina nayivēdyakke hā 40 A mu 13
bhatte mu 6 naṁdādīvige bhatta mu 20
bhatta nu 12 Aḍigaḷige bhatta mu 20 rudrapūje
ge brahmaru nālvarige bhattamu 60 Aṁtu ya mu
ḍe 320 Ayimanavariṁda rudrapūjeya bāḷiṁ
ge Āyimanavaru mūṟuhaṇavina modala
yidu baharu narahari dēvanu māḍide dharmarudra pū
jeya braṁhmaūṭakke mēlōgarakke koṭṭaga 25 yi
na baḍḍiyiṁda naḍaudu Ayimanavariṁda
gaṁdhakege 1 . Uḍu tti koṭṭaga 10 Āhoṁna baḍḍi
yiṁda kēṇiya tiṁgaḷu pratyeyika dina 1 ke ba
barige teppade mūvatu dina naḍaudu Āḷippaḷinu
yiṣṭara koṭṭa ga 12 yīhoṁna baḍḍi yiṁda dvā
dasige dēvara Upārakke Akki mu 3 brāhmaṇaṁge
mū 3 kaṁ bālakriṣṇa koṭaga 13 yi hoṁna ba
ḍḍi yiṁ dyādesege dēvara Upārakke Akkimū 3
brāhmaṇarige mū 5 purāṇikarige ga 2 rūdrapūje
ya brāhmaṇarige Ele Uppinakayi sauḍige ga 4 dēvara
mūlada bāḷanū Ūranālvarūbitta salladu bitida
ḍe Ārasiṁge ga 50 hōrina teruvaru Ura Ayivaru
yi sthānakke ḍa te vāgi yi kaṭṭaḷiyali yidha
rmavanu tappade naḍasi baharu naḍava manusya
ge bhatta mū 12 yi ru Ayiroḷage yi dha
rmava tiḷidaḍe Āyimanavaru vicāravanū mā
ḍuvaru svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vāyōharē
ti vasuṁdharā śaṣṭirvvasasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ
Digital edition of SII 27.397 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
